command:
echo "=== REMY — vm-openclaw .199 ==="
echo "--- systemd service (user) ---"
sudo -u jose systemctl --user status openclaw --no-pager -l 2>/dev/null || echo "user service check failed"
systemctl list-units --all | grep -i openclaw 2>/dev/null

echo "--- listening ports ---"
ss -tlnp | grep -E "9119|8787|8788"

echo "--- openclaw process ---"
ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep

echo "--- recent logs ---"
journalctl --user-unit=openclaw -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null || journalctl -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i openclaw | head -20

echo "--- config file ---"
cat /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print({k:v for k,v in d.items() if k not in ['token','apiKey']})" 2>/dev/null

echo "--- socat check ---"
ps aux | grep socat | grep -v grep
ss -tlnp | grep 8788

echo "--- webhook test local ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost:9119/health 2>/dev/null || curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost:9119 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "LOCAL 9119 UNREACHABLE"

echo "--- public URL test ---"
curl -s --max-time 8 https://remy.cutegrafiks.com/ | head -3 || echo "REMY PUBLIC URL UNREACHABLE"
